title: The Worst of Both Worlds: Zooming From the Office
content: Work life for many is in a mushy middle ground, and what’s at stake isn’t just who is getting talked over in meetings. It’s whether flexibility is sustainable, even with all the benefits it confers.
en_title: The Worst of Both Worlds: Zooming From the Office
en_content: Work life for many is in a mushy middle ground, and what’s at stake isn’t just who is getting talked over in meetings. It’s whether flexibility is sustainable, even with all the benefits it confers.

title: Will an Island in Indonesia Become a New Frontier in the Space Race?
content: An Indigenous clan fears it will lose its place in the world as the government pursues a quest to open a spaceport and lure the billionaire SpaceX founder Elon Musk.

more_info.byline: By Dera Menra Sijabat, Richard C. Paddock and Ulet Ifansasti

en_title: Will an Island in Indonesia Become a New Frontier in the Space Race?
en_content: An Indigenous clan fears it will lose its place in the world as the government pursues a quest to open a spaceport and lure the billionaire SpaceX founder Elon Musk.

title: With Gas Prices High, Calls Grow to Tap Strategic Oil Reserve
content: President Biden is under pressure to release oil from the Strategic Petroleum Reserve. Here’s how it works, and how it might lower prices (modestly, and maybe not for long).
en_title: With Gas Prices High, Calls Grow to Tap Strategic Oil Reserve
en_content: President Biden is under pressure to release oil from the Strategic Petroleum Reserve. Here’s how it works, and how it might lower prices (modestly, and maybe not for long).

title: The Consulting Firm Billionaires Turn to When They Give Away Money
content: A little-known organization called the Bridgespan Group is guiding the philanthropic choices of many leading donors, including MacKenzie Scott.

en_content: A little-known organization called the Bridgespan Group is guiding the philanthropic choices of many leading donors, including MacKenzie Scott.

title: With Halo Infinite, Microsoft Hopes to Rekindle Its Flagship Game
content: Though interest in Halo has waned over the years, the company is banking on a new version to goose sales of its Xbox and subscription gaming service.

title: Retail sales jumped in October in a third straight month of gains.
content: The 1.7 percent increase is in part a result of higher prices, but it shows that American consumer spending remains strong.

en_content: The 1.7 percent increase is in part a result of higher prices, but it shows that American consumer spending remains strong.

title: Walmart beats expectations amid supply chain woes and labor costs.
content: The strong earnings were driven by growth in the company’s grocery and e-commerce business and its strategy of keeping prices low as inflation rises.

title: Amazon agrees to pay $500,000 in California over claims that it hid Covid-19 cases from workers.
content: The judgment, which is subject to court approval, is in line with a “right to know” law that was designed to keep workers safe in the pandemic.

title: What to Expect as Ski Areas Head Into Another Pandemic Season
content: With fewer Covid protocols at many resorts, guests can expect shorter lift lines and less outdoor masking. But policies differ, depending on the area, so know before you go.

title: Hong Kong exempts JPMorgan Chase’s chief from its lengthy quarantine.
content: The exemption for Jamie Dimon, who was in town to meet with employees and regulators, was “justified to facilitate a short visit” of about 30 hours, a government spokesman said.
